titleStmt.title: SII 24.84: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 84. (A.R. No. 14 of 1936-37.) III PRĀKĀRA, EAST WALL.

summary.p: The record is partly covered up by the floor. It seems to register a gift of land to Āriyaṉ Vāsudēva Bhaṭṭaṉ alias Rājarāja Brahmārāyaṉ of Anishṭhānam in Kāśmīradēśam, by the several executive bodies of the temple, in the 39th regnal year of the king. The Śrīkāryam of the temple was Neḍuñjērikkuḍaiyāṉ alias Bhuvaninārāyaṇa Mūvēndavēḷār.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu
vikkiramattoḻilāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayir munaik konan=taḷavaracar tan=taḷamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut to
ḷvalikāṭṭip porppari naṭāttik kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait temarukamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum pontiyāṭai
nannilappāvai tanimaiyun=tavira vantu punitaṟ ṟirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭi Iraṇṭun=taṭa muṭiyākat tonnilavennar cūṭa munnai manuvā
ṟuperukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkol ticai toṟuñ cella veṇkuṭai yirunila viḷākam Eṅkaṇun=tanātu tiruniḻal veṇṇilāt tikaḻa Orutani
meruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟ ṟivāntarattu pūpālar tiṟaiviṭu tanta kalañcori kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa viḷaṅkiya tennavan karun=talai paruntalaittiṭat tan ponnakaṟ puṟattiṭai kiṭap
pa Innāḷ piṟkulap piṟaiyol niṟpiḻaiyennuñcolletir koṭiṟṟallatu tankai villetirkoṭā vikkalan naṅkalit tuṭaṅki maṇ naṭuvenat
vum turatti Eṅkaṇum paṭṭaveṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tanmānamum kūṟina viramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟinamalai kaḷu mutukuneḷippa Iḻin=ta natikaḷuñ cuḻannṟuṭaintoṭa vi
ntalaivirittalamarak kuṭaticai tannāṭukantu tānun tāṉaiyum pannāḷiṭṭa palapala mutukum payantetir māṟina jeyapperuntiruvu(ntiruvum) paḻiyukantu kuṭutta puka
viyum vāḷāviṭṭa maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyum kaṅkamaṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaṇamennum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicaik koṇṭiṇṭiya pukaḻoṭum pāṇṭima
ṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaruparit taraṅkamum poruparik kalaṅkaḷum tantiravāriyumuṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal ten kaṭal paṭarvatu polat taṉ
peruñcenai Evip pañcavaraivarum poruta porkkaḷat tañci � nappukak kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar
tiriyum koṟṟa veñcurameṟṟik koṟṟa vijayastampam ticaitoṟum niṟutti muttin calāpamu muttamiṭ potiyilu matta veṅkari paṭu maiy
yaccayyamuṅ kanniyuṅ kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭik kuṭamalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟellān tanivicumpeṟa māveṟiyatan varutaṉi
t talaivaraikkuṟukalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum ṭṭaruḷut tiṟal koḷiyāramun tiruppuyattala(ra)ṅkaḻum pol viramunti
yākamum viḷaṅkap pārtoḻac civaniṭattumaiyenat tiyākavalli Ulaka muḻutuṭaiyā ḷiruppa Avaḷuṭan kaṅkai viṟṟiruppa maṅkayar tila
tam Eḻicai vallapi Eḻulaka muṭaiyāḷoṭu vāḻiyumalantinitiruppa Ūḻiyuntirumā lākattup piriyātenṟum Avani muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum
viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāna cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kolottuṅka coḻa devaṟku yāṇṭu 3 10 9 Āvatu Āḻvār tiruvaraṅkadeva
rkku śrīkāriyañ ceykiṟa neṭuñcerikkuṭaiyānāna pulani nārāyaṇamuventa(venta) veḷān Olaippaṭi śrīvaiṣṇavavāriyam nālūrt tirunāṭuṭaiyā nampiyum
Iṭaivai(y)tta tiruvaraṅkamāḷi Amutum kāñcikkuṟi vaṭakopura muṭaiyā nampiyum perumpuliyūr vaṇṭuvarāpati nampiyum [bāva] śrī vaiṣṇavadāsanum
Ivvaṟuvom śrī paṇṭāravāriyam Ārāvamutu puṇṭarikanum Āritan śrīrāghava śrī kārimāṟanum Āritan kecavan taniiḷañciṅkamum pā
ratāyan cirāman Ārāvamutum kaucikan śrī kaṇṇan cempoṟ cotiyum pāratāyan Alakecuvaran Aṟi variyānum Ivvaṉaivom Āḻvār ko
yil sabhaikkaṇakku perumpuṟakkaṭal vāmanannan=tan periya koyil piriyanum śrīvaiṣṇavak kaṇakku Ārāvamutu villiyānum pati(neṭṭu)neṭṭu śrī ri
Ivvaṉaivom kaśmiradeśattu Aniṣṭānattu Āriyan vāsudevapaṭṭanāna [ rājarājabrahmārāyaṟku] nāṅkaḷ tta nilamāvatu Āḻvār
tirumaṭaippaḷḷip puṟamāna Irājamahentira vaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭu tirumuṭikku ṟaipkāla kāverikkulai Uṭaintu liṭāyp payirccai
lattil melpāṟkellai kuṭikkulai yum vāykkālukku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai Ippaḻavāykkālukku
kku kiḻpāṟkellai vaṇṭuṟaip paḻavāykku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai periya tiruvaraṅka nilattukku vaṭakkum piṭārittu melninṟaCovered up by floor.
Digital edition of SII 24.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
